data.body:
Goal:
Teach Foolery to select the next runnable step and mutate per-step execution state directly inside execution_plan knot payloads so external agents can drive a plan from start to finish.

Verification:
1. In the Foolery worktree, run targeted tests for GET /api/plans/:id/next and the step start/complete/fail routes; expect payload step state to update and next-step selection to honor dependencies.
2. Exercise a manual drive flow against a stored execution plan and confirm pending, in_progress, complete, and failed step states persist across requests.

Constraints:
- Keep the reviewed route surface: GET /api/plans/:id/next plus POST /api/plans/:id/steps/:stepId/start, /complete, and /fail.
- Step dependency logic should read from the persisted execution-plan structure, including waves and steps, not transient process state.
- Preserve spec runtime status fields in payload form rather than overloading knot workflow state.
data.title: Drive Foolery plan steps from execution_plan payload
